positive: A retro vaporwave aesthetic illustration featuring a stylized neon palm tree, a chrome dolphin, and a setting sun over a grid-patterned ocean. Style: 1980s Miami synthwave, vector art, vibrant magenta and cyan palette, geometric shapes, clean lines.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, messy, sketch
